titleStmt.title: SII 41.378: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 378. (A.R. No. 593 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the slab set up near the first prakāra of the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple at Vijayamaṅgalam.

p.hi: Koṅgu, Rājādhirāja Vira-Chōḻadeva, Year 5, Śaka 1044 = 1122 A.D.

summary.p: Gift of land. Mentions a woman member of Veḷḷāḷan Veḷḷaikaḷ clan of Parañjerpaḷḷi in Kāngayanāḍu gifted some land to the temple of Chināpuramuḍaiyār in Vijaiyamaṅgalam for conducting festivals. The land was situated near the temple of Nangai Nīli at Tennūr, a part of Vijayayamaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cakaraiyāṇ
ṭu Āirattu nāṟpattu nā
lil korājādhirāja
śrīviracoḻadevaṟku tiru
veḻuttiṭṭuc cellā ni
nṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu A
ñcāvatu kuṟuppu nāṭṭu vi
caiyamaṅkalattu mahāde
var cināpuramuṭaiyārkku kā
ṅkayanāṭṭup parañcerpaḷ
ḷi Iruntu vāḻum veḷḷā
ḷan veḷḷaikaḷil cilampan
nilan manaikkiḻatti ciṭṭan kā
viyen vicaiyamaṅkalat
til tennūril naṅkai nili
koyilil nattatil Ukāppā
ṭi vaḻikku kiḻvaḻi teṟku paṭai
ttalai pericāttan ceykku vaṭa
kku kiḻakku veḷḷaika
ḷ toṭṭattukku meṟ
ku vaṭakku cālait tāṟṟik
ku teṟku Innāṟpāl ye
llaikku naṭuvu paṭṭa nilam
vicaiyamaṅkalattil mā
tevaṟku tiruviḻāvikku ti
ruvamutukkuk kuṭutten ci
ṭṭan kāviyen yitu panā
heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.378 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
